auth.sessionExpiredMessage: Your session has expired. Please log in again to continue.
auth.demoPasswordManaged: This is a shared demo environment. Demo account passwords are managed by the system.
auth.insufficientPermissions: You do not have permission to access this resource.
auth.sessionExpiresIn: Session expires in {minutes} minute | Session expires in {minutes} minutes

drives.title: Drives
drives.placeholder: Drives view will be implemented in a future phase.
drives.searchPlaceholder: Search by device, path, project, or ID
drives.enableSuccess: Port enabled. Drive is now available.
drives.enableInUse: Port enabled. Drive remains in use because it is already mounted.
drives.enableNoPort: Cannot enable: drive has no associated port.
drives.enablePortNotFound: Port not found. The port may have been removed or the drive re-seated.
drives.enablePending: Port enabled, but drive is still {state}. Discovery may still be in progress.
drives.formatConfirmBody: Formatting destroys all data on this drive.
drives.ejectConfirmBody: Ensure no active copy operation is running before eject.
drives.ejectBlockedActiveJob: Cannot eject: copy job {jobId} is currently running on this drive.
drives.ejectBlockedUnknownJob: Cannot eject: an active copy operation is running on this drive.
drives.cocPrompt: Drive is ready for safe removal. Generate a chain-of-custody report and confirm handoff details.
drives.projectWarning: Project binding is enforced for all writes.
drives.initializeProjectHint: This drive was last used for project "{project}".
drives.initializeMountRequired: Mount this drive before confirming initialization.
drives.initializeNoProjects: No mounted shares have assigned projects. Add a mount first.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.placeholder: Jobs view will be implemented in a future phase.
jobs.dialogDescription: Select a project first to unlock the matching source and destination options.
jobs.notesHint: Optional operator notes for this job
jobs.noProjectsAvailable: No mounted projects are available. Add and mount a project share first.
jobs.noEligibleDrives: No eligible mounted USB drives are available for the selected project.
jobs.noEligibleMounts: No mounted source shares are available for the selected project.
jobs.selectionUnavailable: The selected drive or mount is no longer available for this project. Review the form and try again.
jobs.overlapConflictExact: A job is already copying from this exact source path to the selected drive (job #{jobId}).
jobs.overlapConflictAncestor: An existing job (#{jobId}) copies from a subdirectory of the requested source. The parent path would duplicate that content.
jobs.overlapConflictDescendant: An existing job (#{jobId}) already copies from a parent path that includes the requested source.
jobs.autoStartFailed: The job was created, but it could not be started automatically.
jobs.listUnavailable: Job listing endpoint is not available on this server version.
jobs.searchPlaceholder: Search by project, evidence, source path, or ID
jobs.sourcePathHint: Path inside the selected mount, for example: folder/subfolder
jobs.editDialogDescription: Review or adjust this job before resuming or finishing the workflow.
jobs.deleteConfirmBody: This removes the pending job and releases its current drive assignment. This action cannot be undone.
jobs.clearStartupAnalysisConfirmBody: This removes the cached startup scan for this job. The next restart will rescan the source before copy work begins.
jobs.pauseRequestedMessage: Waiting for active copy threads to finish the current work before the pause completes. Start will be available once the job is fully paused.
jobs.progressPreparingDetail: Scanning source files and calculating totals before copy work begins. This can take time for large evidence sets.
jobs.failureReasonFallback: This job failed. Review the file status entries and logs for more details.
jobs.relatedLogEntryMissing: No matching line was found in the main application log for this failure. Older failures may not have a directly correlated log line yet.
jobs.showingFiles: Showing the first {shown} of {total} file rows.
jobs.hashViewerEmpty: Select a file to load hashes.
jobs.compareHelp: Select an exported file to compare its source version with the copied destination version.

mounts.title: Mounts
mounts.placeholder: Mounts view will be implemented in a future phase.
mounts.testFailed: Share test failed. Review the remote path or credentials and try again.
mounts.testSuccess: Share test passed. You can now save these changes.
mounts.updateFailed: Share update failed. Review the returned mount status before closing the dialog.
mounts.removeConfirmBody: Removing a mount may impact in-progress jobs.
mounts.browseUnavailable: Browse is only available for mounted shares

browse.loadError: Failed to load directory listing. Please try again.

audit.title: Audit
audit.placeholder: Audit view will be implemented in a future phase.
audit.handoffWarningMessage: This action will permanently archive the drive and remove it from active circulation. All operational actions (initialization, copy jobs, eject) will be blocked, and chain-of-custody selectors will exclude the drive. Read-only history (audit logs, drive list) remains visible. This action cannot be undone.
audit.driveArchived: This drive has been archived after handoff. The chain-of-custody report endpoint does not return reports for archived drives, but the drive remains visible in the drive list and audit log.
audit.handoffInvalid: Drive ID, possessor, and delivery time are required.
audit.cocSelectRequired: Select at least one filter (drive, serial number, or project) before loading the chain of custody.
audit.deliveryTimeHint: Enter the date and time in UTC — the value will be stored as UTC regardless of your local timezone.

users.title: Users
users.placeholder: Users view will be implemented in a future phase.
users.loadRolesError: Failed to load role assignments. Role data may be incomplete.
users.existingOsUserConfirmMessage: User already exists on this system. Do you want to add this existing OS user to ECUBE?
users.demoManagementLocked: Demo mode disables creating users and changing role assignments.

system.title: System
system.placeholder: System view will be implemented in a future phase.
system.setupPlaceholder: Setup wizard will be implemented in Phase 5.
system.jobPickerPlaceholder: Choose a job (or enter ID manually)
system.jobPickerUnavailable: Job picker is unavailable on this server version. Enter a job ID manually.
system.logsNotConfigured: System logs are unavailable because file-based logging is not configured on the backend.
system.logsUnavailable: System logs are currently unavailable because the configured backend log path cannot be read.
system.logViewerEmpty: No log lines available for the selected filters.
system.enterJobId: Enter a job ID before loading debug details.
system.jobNotFound: No job was found for the provided job ID.

setup.provisionAlready: Database is already provisioned. Continuing with existing schema.
setup.adminCreated: Admin user created successfully. Continue to the next step.
setup.adminReconciled: Existing OS admin user reconciled successfully. Continue to the next step.
setup.alreadyInitialized: Setup is already complete. Please log in.
setup.dockerHostHint: Running inside a container — using the Docker Compose service name as the database host.

configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.description: Update selected runtime settings without shell access. Admin role required.

log_format.label: Log Format
log_format.help: Use text for human readability or json for structured ingestion.

log_file.label: Log File Path
log_file.help: When unchecked, ECUBE clears LOG_FILE in .env. When checked, ECUBE sets LOG_FILE to the path shown above (default: /var/log/ecube/app.log).

db_pool_recycle_seconds.label: DB Pool Recycle Seconds
db_pool_recycle_seconds.help: Changes to this value are applied after service restart.

configuration.pendingRestartBody: Some configuration changes are pending and require restarting the ECUBE service.

confirmRestart.title: Restart ECUBE service?
confirmRestart.body: Some configuration changes require restarting the ECUBE service to take effect. Restart now?

toasts.pendingRestart: Changes saved. Restart is required for all updates to take effect.

errors.networkError: Unable to reach the server. Check your network connection and try again.
errors.serverError: Server error ({status}). Please try again later.
errors.invalidRequest: Invalid request. Please check your input.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.insufficientPermissions: Insufficient permissions. Your role may not allow this action.
errors.requestConflict: Request conflict. Please refresh and try again.
errors.validationFailed: Validation failed. Please review your input.
